<summary>How to use this template</summary>

- Store glossary documents under `docs/` or domain-specific directories.
- Keep definitions atomic; if additional context is needed, link to canonical
  references.
- Include translations or abbreviations as needed for regulatory reporting.
- Remove this block before publishing.
